styles.body: font-orbitron text-base leading-relaxed bg-gradient-to-br from-[#020617] via-[#1E1B4B] to-[#312E81] text-[#E0E7FF]
styles.h1: text-5xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#A78BFA] to-[#C4B5FD] text-transparent bg-clip-text mb-10
styles.select: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-md text-[#fff] bg-[#1E1B4B]/80
styles.checkbox: relative w-6 h-6 bg-[#1E1B4B] border-[#6366F1] border-2 peer-checked:bg-gradient-to-r from-[#6366F1] to-[#A78BFA]
styles.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#4338CA] rounded-lg bg-[#1E1B4B]/80 text-[#E0E7FF] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#A78BFA] focus:border-[#A78BFA] backdrop-blur
styles.textarea: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#4338CA] rounded-lg bg-[#1E1B4B]/80 text-[#E0E7FF] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#A78BFA] focus:border-[#A78BFA] backdrop-blur
styles.button: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#6366F1] to-[#A78BFA] text-[#1E1B4B] px-4 py-2 rounded
